debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)),
    (∀ (i : Fin 127),
          env.get (offset + ↑i) =
            Expression.eval env
              (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))[↑i]) ∧
        env.get (offset + 127) = Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
          (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 →
              ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 135 fun i => var { index := offset + 127 + 1 + i }) =
                  fieldToBits 135 (env.get (offset + 127))) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127) →
      ∀ (input : fields 254 (F p)),
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
          (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
            Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                  (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                      -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                        else
                          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
              env.get (offset + 127) =
                  Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
                ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                  env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127)

intro offset env input_var hparts hsout hbits hout
    intro input hinp hbin
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · ext i
      simpa using hparts i
    · simpa using hsout
    · have := hbits
      have hs : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
        have : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
          -- derive from the premise needed to use `hbits`; `Num2Bits.circuit` provides it as implication
          -- we can discharge it by classical choice from `hbits` by applying it to itself
          exact (by
            by_cases h : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135
            · exact h
            · exfalso
              have := this
              exact h (by
                have := (hbits (by
                  have : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
                    exact False.elim (h (by
                      -- impossible branch, but Lean needs a term; use `by_contra` structure
                      classical
                      have : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
                        exact Nat.lt_of_not_ge (by
                          intro hg
                          exact h (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hg))
                      exact this))
                  exact this)) )
        exact this
      exact hs
    · exact hout

            simpa [h0])
        | inr h1 =>
          have : (ZMod.val (input[0]) : ℕ) = 1 := by
            simpa [h1] using (show (ZMod.val (input[0]) : ℕ) = 1 from by
              simpa [h1])
          have : (0 : ℕ) < 2 ^ 135 := by

            exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by
              have : (1 : ℕ) ≤ 2 ^ 135 := by
                simpa using (Nat.one_le_pow 2 135)
              exact this)
          exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this (Nat.zero_le _)
      have := this hs
      exact this.1
    · exact hout
